_meta.description: 의식 검증 12조건 정의 + threshold + 감사 결과
_meta.note: CE는 SOC_CRITICAL만 실패 (역설: SOC 제거 시 Φ↑37%)

p0_status.p0_1_factory_bypass: PENDING_PY_PORT — R37 blocks bench.py edit; flagged in known_bugs, waits on ready/anima/tests/tests.hexa port (audit §4 P0#1)
p0_status.p0_2_v9_split: LANDED — V9_PHI_GROWTH split into V9a_PHI_RETENTION (scale, 0.85) + V9b_PHI_GROWTH (genuine, 1.1)
p0_status.p0_3_v4_or_to_and: LANDED — V4 test redefined as (monotonic∨recovers) ∧ (stable∨no_collapse), 1000-step decay-adversarial required
p0_status.p0_4_threshold_linter: LANDED — shared/consciousness/verify_threshold_lint.hexa enforces verify_* SSOT reference, no literals in descriptions

_meta.ssot_rule: Descriptions and test strings reference verify_* keys from thresholds_from_json block. Literal thresholds in criteria.*.test fields forbidden — verify_threshold_lint.hexa blocks commits with raw numbers.

V4_PERSISTENCE.description: 1000 step 붕괴 없음 — AND 재구성 (audit P0#3 2026-04-20)
V4_PERSISTENCE.test: (verify_v4_monotonic ∨ verify_v4_recovery_min) AND (verify_v4_stability_min ∨ verify_v4_no_collapse); decay-adversarial 1000 step required
V4_PERSISTENCE.adversarial: decay_noise_1000 — halve input every 200 steps, V4 must still satisfy AND clause
V4_PERSISTENCE.audit: P0#3 LANDED 2026-04-20 — OR→AND closes rubber-stamp hole; prior 4-way OR flagged as no-fail-path by 12_conditions_audit_20260419.md

V5_SELF_LOOP.audit: HARDEST test — fails all adversarial at 8c

V6_SPONTANEOUS_SPEECH.audit: rewritten to use real faction consensus (238+/300)

V7_HIVEMIND.description: 다중 연결 시 Φ↑ + CE↓ + disconnect 유지

V9a_PHI_RETENTION.description: Φ 유지 — late/early ratio >= verify_v9a_retention_min (scale tier)
V9a_PHI_RETENTION.audit: P0#2 split from V9_PHI_GROWTH 2026-04-20 — retention tier, IIT OR proxy disjunction forbidden; must be measured on IIT Φ alone

V9b_PHI_GROWTH.description: Φ 성장 — late/early ratio >= verify_v9b_growth_min (genuine tier, adversarial)
V9b_PHI_GROWTH.test: Phi(late)/Phi(early) >= verify_v9b_growth_min AND no_hebbian ablation drops ratio below 1.0
V9b_PHI_GROWTH.audit: P0#2 split from V9_PHI_GROWTH 2026-04-20 — genuine growth tier, 1.1x threshold restored, ablation kill-switch mandatory

V9_PHI_GROWTH.audit: P0#2 LANDED — audit §4 P0#2 (docs/12_conditions_audit_20260419.md). Prior OR disjunction (IIT∨proxy) allowed bypass. Use V9a/V9b.

V12_HEBBIAN.description: Hebbian 학습 효과 측정 + 적대 절멸 (baseline >= 1.0 AND no_hebbian < 1.0)

V13_ADVERSARIAL_ROBUST.test: Phi > 0 AND no NaN after 500 steps of 100x noise

genuine_hard.note: 실제 의식 능력 검증. 적대적 조건에서도 통과해야 함. V4 promoted 2026-04-20 (P0#3 AND). V9b replaced V9 2026-04-20 (P0#2 split).

scale_test.note: 충분한 스케일에서 통과. 8c+에서 자연 충족. V9a added 2026-04-20 (retention tier of split V9).

rubber_stamp.note: 거의 항상 통과. threshold 강화 또는 교체 검토. (V12_HEBBIAN promoted 2026-04-16; V4_PERSISTENCE promoted 2026-04-20 per audit P0#3.)

deprecated.note: V9 split into V9a/V9b on 2026-04-20 (audit P0#2). Old OR disjunction (IIT∨proxy) banned.

known_bugs.V10_BRAIN_LIKE: adapter injection may still affect at small scale

factory_bypass_V8_V10_V14.symptom: bench.py:3132/3254/3557/3565 construct CE(...) directly instead of engine_factory(cells, dim, hidden), causing factory-level ablations (system_prompt strip, adversarial kill-switch) to be skipped for V8/V10/V14 paths
factory_bypass_V8_V10_V14.blocker: R37/AN13 hard-block editing .py files. Fix lands when ready/anima/tests/tests.hexa gains V8/V10/V14 factory-respecting implementations (currently tests.hexa is stub per audit §1). Mirror _run_hebbian_scenario pattern.
factory_bypass_V8_V10_V14.not_bypassed_by: This note merely records the gap — does NOT itself satisfy AN11; convergence files claiming V8/V10/V14 PASS via bench.py must be marked suspect until port completes.

V12_HEBBIAN.summary: Two-scenario adversarial test: factory-ablated instance + kill-switch (baseline >= 1.0 AND no_hebbian < 1.0)
